   "source": [
    "# Proses TensorFlow Klasifikasi Kemasan Produk\n",
    "Notebook ini disusun untuk dokumentasi skripsi (siap screenshot) dengan alur bertahap:\n",
    "1. Persiapan lingkungan\n",
    "2. Organisasi dataset foto kemasan\n",
    "3. Analisis distribusi data (grafik)\n",
    "4. Pelatihan model TensorFlow\n",
    "5. Evaluasi hasil pelatihan (grafik)\n",
    "6. Konversi model ke TFLite\n",
    "7. Penyalinan output model ke Flutter\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Tahap 1 - Instalasi dan Import Library\n",
    "**Tujuan kode ini:**\n",
    "- Memastikan dependency utama tersedia\n",
    "- Menyiapkan library untuk pemrosesan gambar, training model, dan visualisasi grafik\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "4e93c47f",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Note: you may need to restart the kernel to use updated packages.\n"
     ]

   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",

   "id": "34b15d21",
   "metadata": {},

   ],
   "source": [
    "import os\n",
    "import re\n",
    "import gc\n",
    "import json\n",
    "import shutil\n",
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "from collections import defaultdict\n",
    "\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import tensorflow as tf\n",
    "from tensorflow import keras\n",
    "from tensorflow.keras import layers\n",
    "from tensorflow.keras.applications import MobileNetV2\n",
    "from tensorflow.keras.applications.mobilenet_v2 import preprocess_input\n",
    "from PIL import Image, ImageEnhance, ImageFilter\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "# Stabilitas eksekusi di laptop\n",
    "os.environ['TF_CPP_MIN_LOG_LEVEL'] = '2'\n",
    "try:\n",
    "    tf.config.set_visible_devices([], 'GPU')\n",
    "except Exception:\n",
    "    pass\n",
    "\n",
    "try:\n",
    "    tf.config.threading.set_intra_op_parallelism_threads(1)\n",
    "    tf.config.threading.set_inter_op_parallelism_threads(1)\n",
    "except Exception:\n",
    "    pass\n",
    "\n",
    "os.environ['CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES'] = '-1'\n",
    "print('TensorFlow version:', tf.__version__)\n"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "## Tahap 2 - Konfigurasi Folder Input/Output\n",
    "**Tujuan kode ini:**\n",
    "- Menentukan lokasi foto mentah\n",
    "- Menentukan lokasi output proses skripsi\n",
    "- Menyatukan struktur output agar rapi untuk dokumentasi\n",
    "\n",
    "**Struktur output yang dipakai:**\n",
    "- `MODEL/output/dataset-fotokemasan` : dataset yang sudah disusun per kelas\n",
    "- `MODEL/output/model-hasil` : model training, file `.tflite`, labels, metadata\n"
   ]

   "source": [
    "ROOT = Path.cwd().parent if Path.cwd().name.lower() == 'model' else Path.cwd()\n",

   "source": [
    "## Tahap 4 - Fungsi Bantu Organisasi Dataset\n",
    "**Tujuan kode ini:**\n",
    "- Membersihkan nama produk dari nama file\n",
    "- Menyusun foto ke folder per kelas\n",
    "- Menambah data augmentasi untuk kelas dengan gambar sedikit\n",
    "\n",
    "Hal ini penting supaya model belajar lebih seimbang antar produk.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "66bd7a84",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def augment_image_pil(img_pil, variant):\n",
    "    import random\n",
    "    random.seed(variant)\n",
    "    w, h = img_pil.size\n",
    "\n",
    "    if random.random() > 0.5:\n",
    "        img_pil = img_pil.transpose(Image.FLIP_LEFT_RIGHT)\n",
    "\n",
    "    angle = random.uniform(-15, 15)\n",
    "    img_pil = img_pil.rotate(angle, fillcolor=(128, 128, 128), expand=False)\n",
    "\n",
    "    img_pil = ImageEnhance.Brightness(img_pil).enhance(random.uniform(0.7, 1.3))\n",
    "    img_pil = ImageEnhance.Contrast(img_pil).enhance(random.uniform(0.7, 1.3))\n",
    "    img_pil = ImageEnhance.Color(img_pil).enhance(random.uniform(0.8, 1.2))\n",
    "\n",
    "    crop_pct = random.uniform(0.85, 1.0)\n",
    "    new_w = int(w * crop_pct)\n",
    "    new_h = int(h * crop_pct)\n",
    "    left = random.randint(0, max(0, w - new_w))\n",
    "    top = random.randint(0, max(0, h - new_h))\n",
    "    img_pil = img_pil.crop((left, top, left + new_w, top + new_h)).resize((w, h), Image.LANCZOS)\n",
    "\n",
    "    if random.random() > 0.7:\n",
    "        img_pil = img_pil.filter(ImageFilter.GaussianBlur(radius=random.uniform(0.5, 1.5)))\n",
    "\n",
    "    return img_pil\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def extract_product_name(filename):\n",
    "    name = Path(filename).stem\n",
    "    if name.startswith('IMG_'):\n",
    "        return ''\n",
    "    name = re.sub(r'^\\d+_', '', name)\n",
    "    name = name.replace('_', ' ')\n",
    "    name = re.sub(r'\\s+', ' ', name).strip()\n",
    "    return name\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def organize_dataset(product_images_dir, output_dir):\n",
    "    if output_dir.exists():\n",
    "        shutil.rmtree(output_dir)\n",
    "    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "    mapping = {}\n",
    "\n",
    "    for category in ['food', 'drink']:\n",
    "        cat_dir = product_images_dir / category\n",
    "        if not cat_dir.exists():\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "\n",
    "        all_files = sorted(cat_dir.iterdir())\n",
    "        current_product = None\n",
    "\n",
    "        for img_file in all_files:\n",
    "            if img_file.suffix.lower() not in ('.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.bmp', '.webp'):\n",
    "                continue\n",
    "\n",
    "            product_name = extract_product_name(img_file.name)\n",
    "\n",
    "            if product_name:\n",
    "                current_product = product_name\n",
    "                if current_product not in mapping:\n",
    "                    mapping[current_product] = {\n",
    "                        'name': product_name,\n",
    "                        'category': category,\n",
    "                        'images': []\n",
    "                    }\n",
    "                mapping[current_product]['images'].append(str(img_file))\n",
    "            else:\n",
    "                if current_product and current_product in mapping:\n",
    "                    mapping[current_product]['images'].append(str(img_file))\n",
    "\n",
    "    class_count = 0\n",
    "    total_images = 0\n",
    "    total_augmented = 0\n",
    "\n",
    "    for key in sorted(mapping.keys()):\n",
    "        info = mapping[key]\n",
    "        safe_name = re.sub(r'[<>:\"/\\|?*]', '_', info['name'])\n",
    "        class_dir = output_dir / safe_name\n",
    "        class_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "        original_count = 0\n",
    "        for idx, img_path in enumerate(info['images']):\n",
    "            src = Path(img_path)\n",
    "            dst = class_dir / f'orig_{idx:04d}.jpg'\n",
    "            try:\n",
    "                img = Image.open(str(src)).convert('RGB')\n",
    "                img.save(str(dst), 'JPEG', quality=95)\n",
    "                original_count += 1\n",
    "            except Exception:\n",
    "                pass\n",
    "\n",
    "        if original_count == 0:\n",
    "            shutil.rmtree(str(class_dir), ignore_errors=True)\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "\n",
    "        aug_count = 0\n",
    "        if original_count < MIN_AUGMENTED_IMAGES:\n",
    "            needed = MIN_AUGMENTED_IMAGES - original_count\n",
    "            orig_files = list(class_dir.glob('orig_*'))\n",
    "            for aug_idx in range(needed):\n",
    "                src_file = orig_files[aug_idx % len(orig_files)]\n",
    "                try:\n",
    "                    img = Image.open(str(src_file)).convert('RGB')\n",
    "                    augmented = augment_image_pil(img, aug_idx + 1000)\n",
    "                    dst = class_dir / f'aug_{aug_idx:04d}.jpg'\n",
    "                    augmented.save(str(dst), quality=90)\n",
    "                    aug_count += 1\n",
    "                except Exception:\n",
    "                    pass\n",
    "\n",
    "        class_count += 1\n",
    "        total_images += original_count + aug_count\n",
    "        total_augmented += aug_count\n",
    "\n",
    "    print(f'[OK] Kelas: {class_count}')\n",
    "    print(f'[OK] Total gambar: {total_images} (augmentasi: {total_augmented})')\n",
    "    return mapping\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3f866a20",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [

   "source": [
    "mapping = organize_dataset(INPUT_FOTO, DATASET_FOTOKEMASAN)\n",
    "print('Jumlah produk unik:', len(mapping))\n",
    "\n",
    "# preview 15 kelas pertama\n",
    "items = list(mapping.items())\n",
    "for i, (nama, info) in enumerate(items[:15], start=1):\n",
    "    print(f\"{i:02d}. [{info['category']}] {nama} -> {len(info['images'])} foto asli\")\n",

    "print(\"Total kelas:\", len(items))\n"
   ]

    "class_counts = []\n",
    "for cls_dir in sorted(DATASET_FOTOKEMASAN.iterdir()):\n",
    "    if cls_dir.is_dir():\n",
    "        n = len(list(cls_dir.glob('*.jpg')))\n",
    "        class_counts.append((cls_dir.name, n))\n",
    "\n",
    "counts_only = [x[1] for x in class_counts]\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 4))\n",
    "plt.hist(counts_only, bins=12, color='#27B48A', edgecolor='black')\n",
    "plt.title('Distribusi Jumlah Gambar per Kelas')\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Jumlah gambar di 1 kelas')\n",
    "plt.ylabel('Frekuensi kelas')\n",
    "plt.grid(alpha=0.25)\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "top10 = sorted(class_counts, key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:10]\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))\n",
    "plt.barh([x[0][:25] for x in top10][::-1], [x[1] for x in top10][::-1], color='#1F9D78')\n",
    "plt.title('10 Kelas dengan Jumlah Gambar Terbanyak')\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Jumlah gambar')\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "print('Total kelas:', len(class_counts))\n",
    "print('Rata-rata gambar/kelas:', round(float(np.mean(counts_only)) if counts_only else 0.0, 2))\n"
   ]

   "source": [
    "train_ds = keras.utils.image_dataset_from_directory(\n",
    "    str(DATASET_FOTOKEMASAN),\n",
    "    validation_split=VALIDATION_SPLIT,\n",
    "    subset='training',\n",
    "    seed=42,\n",
    "    image_size=(IMG_SIZE, IMG_SIZE),\n",
    "    batch_size=BATCH_SIZE,\n",
    "    label_mode='categorical',\n",
    "    shuffle=True,\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "val_ds = keras.utils.image_dataset_from_directory(\n",
    "    str(DATASET_FOTOKEMASAN),\n",
    "    validation_split=VALIDATION_SPLIT,\n",
    "    subset='validation',\n",
    "    seed=42,\n",
    "    image_size=(IMG_SIZE, IMG_SIZE),\n",
    "    batch_size=BATCH_SIZE,\n",
    "    label_mode='categorical',\n",
    "    shuffle=False,\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "class_names = train_ds.class_names\n",
    "num_classes = len(class_names)\n",
    "\n",
    "train_ds = train_ds.prefetch(buffer_size=1)\n",
    "val_ds = val_ds.prefetch(buffer_size=1)\n",
    "\n",
    "print('Jumlah kelas:', num_classes)\n",
    "print('Batch train:', len(train_ds), 'Batch validasi:', len(val_ds))\n"
   ]

   "source": [
    "## Tahap 8 - Membangun Arsitektur Model\n",
    "**Tujuan kode ini:**\n",
    "- Menggunakan transfer learning MobileNetV2\n",
    "- Menambah layer klasifikasi untuk kelas produk\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "525148a7",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def create_data_augmentation():\n",
    "    return keras.Sequential([\n",
    "        layers.RandomFlip('horizontal'),\n",
    "        layers.RandomRotation(0.1),\n",
    "        layers.RandomZoom((-0.1, 0.1)),\n",
    "        layers.RandomBrightness(0.15),\n",
    "        layers.RandomContrast(0.15),\n",
    "    ], name='data_augmentation')\n",
    "\n",
    "def build_model(num_classes):\n",
    "    base_model = MobileNetV2(input_shape=(IMG_SIZE, IMG_SIZE, 3), include_top=False, weights='imagenet')\n",
    "    base_model.trainable = False\n",
    "\n",
    "    inputs = keras.Input(shape=(IMG_SIZE, IMG_SIZE, 3), name='image')\n",
    "    x = create_data_augmentation()(inputs, training=True)\n",
    "    x = preprocess_input(x)\n",
    "    x = base_model(x, training=False)\n",
    "    x = layers.GlobalAveragePooling2D(name='gap')(x)\n",
    "    x = layers.Dense(512, activation='relu', kernel_regularizer=keras.regularizers.l2(0.001), name='dense_512')(x)\n",
    "    x = layers.Dropout(0.4, name='dropout_1')(x)\n",
    "    x = layers.Dense(256, activation='relu', kernel_regularizer=keras.regularizers.l2(0.001), name='dense_256')(x)\n",
    "    x = layers.Dropout(0.3, name='dropout_2')(x)\n",
    "    outputs = layers.Dense(num_classes, activation='softmax', name='predictions')(x)\n",
    "    return keras.Model(inputs, outputs, name='snack_classifier'), base_model\n",
    "\n",
    "# Auto-resolve num_classes agar Tahap 8 bisa jalan mandiri\n",
    "if 'num_classes' not in globals() or num_classes is None:\n",
    "    if 'class_names' in globals() and class_names:\n",
    "        num_classes = len(class_names)\n",
    "    elif 'train_ds' in globals() and hasattr(train_ds, 'class_names') and train_ds.class_names:\n",
    "        class_names = list(train_ds.class_names)\n",
    "        num_classes = len(class_names)\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        raise RuntimeError('num_classes belum tersedia. Jalankan tahap pembuatan dataset/class names terlebih dahulu.')\n",
    "\n",
    "model, base_model = build_model(num_classes)\n",
    "print('num_classes =', num_classes)\n",
    "model.summary()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "1fced5da",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Tahap 9 - Training Model (Phase 1)\n",
    "**Tujuan kode ini:**\n",
    "- Melatih classifier head terlebih dahulu\n",
    "- Mendapatkan akurasi awal model\n"
   ]
  },

   "execution_count": 2,

   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [

     "ename": "NameError",

      "\u001b[31mNameError\u001b[39m                                 Traceback (most recent call last)",
      "\u001b[36mCell\u001b[39m\u001b[36m \u001b[39m\u001b[32mIn[2]\u001b[39m\u001b[32m, line 1\u001b[39m\n\u001b[32m----> \u001b[39m\u001b[32m1\u001b[39m \u001b[43mmodel\u001b[49m.compile(\n\u001b[32m      2\u001b[39m     optimizer=keras.optimizers.Adam(learning_rate=LEARNING_RATE_PHASE1),\n\u001b[32m      3\u001b[39m     loss=\u001b[33m'\u001b[39m\u001b[33mcategorical_crossentropy\u001b[39m\u001b[33m'\u001b[39m,\n\u001b[32m      4\u001b[39m     metrics=[\u001b[33m'\u001b[39m\u001b[33maccuracy\u001b[39m\u001b[33m'\u001b[39m]\n\u001b[32m      5\u001b[39m )\n\u001b[32m      7\u001b[39m history1 = model.fit(\n\u001b[32m      8\u001b[39m     train_ds,\n\u001b[32m      9\u001b[39m     validation_data=val_ds,\n\u001b[32m   (...)\u001b[39m\u001b[32m     15\u001b[39m     verbose=\u001b[32m1\u001b[39m,\n\u001b[32m     16\u001b[39m )\n\u001b[32m     18\u001b[39m \u001b[38;5;66;03m# Simpan history phase 1 agar bisa divisualisasikan ulang setelah restart kernel\u001b[39;00m\n",
      "\u001b[31mNameError\u001b[39m: name 'model' is not defined"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "model.compile(optimizer=keras.optimizers.Adam(learning_rate=LEARNING_RATE_PHASE1), loss='categorical_crossentropy', metrics=['accuracy'])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Stabil: otomatis pakai subset jika dataset besar\n",
    "train_steps = 80\n",
    "val_steps = 20\n",
    "train_ds_run = train_ds.take(train_steps)\n",
    "val_ds_run = val_ds.take(val_steps)\n",
    "\n",
    "history1 = model.fit(\n",
    "    train_ds_run,\n",
    "    validation_data=val_ds_run,\n",
    "    epochs=EPOCHS_PHASE1,\n",
    "    callbacks=[\n",
    "        keras.callbacks.EarlyStopping(monitor='val_accuracy', patience=2, restore_best_weights=True, verbose=1),\n",
    "        keras.callbacks.ReduceLROnPlateau(monitor='val_loss', factor=0.5, patience=1, min_lr=1e-6, verbose=1),\n",
    "    ],\n",
    "    verbose=1,\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "history_phase1_path = MODEL_HASIL / 'history_phase1.json'\n",
    "history_phase1_path.write_text(json.dumps(history1.history, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')\n",
    "print('History disimpan:', history_phase1_path)\n"
   ]
  },
  {

   "source": [

   "source": [
    "# Ambil history dari memori; jika kernel restart, fallback ke file JSON\n",
    "hist_obj = globals().get('history2') or globals().get('history1')\n",
    "history_data = hist_obj.history if hist_obj is not None else None\n",
    "\n",
    "if history_data is None:\n",
    "    history_phase1_path = MODEL_HASIL / 'history_phase1.json'\n",
    "    if history_phase1_path.exists():\n",
    "        history_data = json.loads(history_phase1_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))\n",
    "        print('History dimuat dari file:', history_phase1_path)\n",
    "\n",
    "if history_data is None:\n",
    "    print('History training belum ada. Jalankan Tahap 9 terlebih dahulu, lalu jalankan ulang Tahap 10.')\n",
    "else:\n",
    "    acc = history_data.get('accuracy', [])\n",
    "    val_acc = history_data.get('val_accuracy', [])\n",
    "    loss = history_data.get('loss', [])\n",
    "    val_loss = history_data.get('val_loss', [])\n",
    "\n",
    "    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 4))\n",
    "    plt.subplot(1, 2, 1)\n",
    "    plt.plot(acc, label='Train Accuracy', marker='o')\n",
    "    plt.plot(val_acc, label='Val Accuracy', marker='o')\n",
    "    plt.title('Grafik Akurasi Training')\n",
    "    plt.xlabel('Epoch')\n",
    "    plt.ylabel('Akurasi')\n",
    "    plt.legend()\n",
    "    plt.grid(alpha=0.25)\n",
    "\n",
    "    plt.subplot(1, 2, 2)\n",
    "    plt.plot(loss, label='Train Loss', marker='o')\n",
    "    plt.plot(val_loss, label='Val Loss', marker='o')\n",
    "    plt.title('Grafik Loss Training')\n",
    "    plt.xlabel('Epoch')\n",
    "    plt.ylabel('Loss')\n",
    "    plt.legend()\n",
    "    plt.grid(alpha=0.25)\n",
    "\n",
    "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "    plt.show()\n"
   ]

    "## Tahap 11 - Fine-Tuning (Opsional)\n",
    "**Tujuan kode ini:**\n",
    "- Meningkatkan performa dengan membuka sebagian layer backbone\n",
    "- **Default dimatikan** agar lebih stabil untuk laptop\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 12,
   "id": "688df8a8",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Fine-tuning dilewati (EPOCHS_PHASE2=0).\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "if EPOCHS_PHASE2 > 0:\n",
    "    base_model.trainable = True\n",
    "    for layer in base_model.layers[:FINE_TUNE_FROM_LAYER]:\n",
    "        layer.trainable = False\n",
    "\n",
    "    model.compile(\n",
    "        optimizer=keras.optimizers.Adam(learning_rate=LEARNING_RATE_PHASE2),\n",
    "        loss='categorical_crossentropy',\n",
    "        metrics=['accuracy']\n",
    "    )\n",
    "\n",
    "    history2 = model.fit(\n",
    "        train_ds,\n",
    "        validation_data=val_ds,\n",
    "        epochs=EPOCHS_PHASE2,\n",
    "        callbacks=[\n",
    "            keras.callbacks.EarlyStopping(monitor='val_accuracy', patience=5, restore_best_weights=True, verbose=1),\n",
    "            keras.callbacks.ReduceLROnPlateau(monitor='val_loss', factor=0.5, patience=2, min_lr=1e-7, verbose=1),\n",
    "        ],\n",
    "        verbose=1,\n",
    "    )\n",
    "else:\n",
    "    print('Fine-tuning dilewati (EPOCHS_PHASE2=0).')\n"
   ]
  },

    "gc.collect()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Evaluasi ringan agar kernel tidak mati\n",
    "try:\n",

    "keras_path = MODEL_HASIL / 'model_klasifikasi_kemasan.keras'\n",
    "h5_path = MODEL_HASIL / 'model_klasifikasi_kemasan.h5'\n",
    "model.save(str(keras_path), include_optimizer=False)\n",
    "model.save(str(h5_path), include_optimizer=False, save_format='h5')\n",
    "print('Model disimpan:', keras_path)\n",
    "print('Backup H5 disimpan:', h5_path)\n"
   ]

  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",

   "source": [
    "## Tahap 13 - Konversi ke TFLite\n",
    "**Tujuan kode ini:**\n",
    "- Mengubah model menjadi format `.tflite` untuk dipakai di aplikasi Android\n",
    "- Menyimpan `labels.txt` dan metadata kelas\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "0325be1c",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Simpan labels + metadata\n",
    "labels_path = MODEL_HASIL / 'labels.txt'\n",
    "labels_path.write_text('\\n'.join(class_names), encoding='utf-8')\n",
    "metadata = [{'label_index': i, 'name': name} for i, name in enumerate(class_names)]\n",
    "metadata_path = MODEL_HASIL / 'metadata_model.json'\n",
    "metadata_path.write_text(json.dumps(metadata, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Convert TFLite robust: coba model aktif, fallback model .keras\n",
    "def _convert(src_model, quant=False):\n",
    "    conv = tf.lite.TFLiteConverter.from_keras_model(src_model)\n",
    "    if quant:\n",
    "        conv.optimizations = [tf.lite.Optimize.DEFAULT]\n",
    "        conv.target_spec.supported_types = [tf.float16]\n",
    "    conv.target_spec.supported_ops = [tf.lite.OpsSet.TFLITE_BUILTINS]\n",
    "    return conv.convert()\n",
    "\n",
    "buf = None\n",
    "err = None\n",
    "if 'model' in globals() and model is not None:\n",
    "    try:\n",
    "        buf = _convert(model, quant=False)\n",
    "    except Exception as e:\n",
    "        err = e\n",
    "\n",
    "if buf is None:\n",
    "    keras_path = MODEL_HASIL / 'model_klasifikasi_kemasan.keras'\n",
    "    loaded = keras.models.load_model(str(keras_path), compile=False)\n",
    "    try:\n",
    "        buf = _convert(loaded, quant=False)\n",
    "    except Exception as e:\n",
    "        err = e\n",
    "\n",
    "if buf is None:\n",
    "    raise RuntimeError(f'Konversi TFLite gagal: {err}')\n",
    "\n",
    "tflite_path = MODEL_HASIL / 'model_klasifikasi_kemasan.tflite'\n",
    "tflite_path.write_bytes(buf)\n",
    "print('TFLite disimpan di:', tflite_path)\n",
    "print('Ukuran file (MB):', round(tflite_path.stat().st_size / (1024 * 1024), 2))\n",
    "print('Labels disimpan di:', labels_path)\n",
    "print('Metadata disimpan di:', metadata_path)\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Tahap 14 - Salin Output ke Flutter\n",
    "**Tujuan kode ini:**\n",
    "- Menyalin model `.tflite` dan labels ke folder asset Flutter\n",
    "- Agar langsung bisa dipakai oleh aplikasi mobile\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "FLUTTER_ML_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "shutil.copy2(str(tflite_path), str(FLUTTER_ML_DIR / 'smartsnack_model.tflite'))\n",
    "shutil.copy2(str(labels_path), str(FLUTTER_ML_DIR / 'smartsnack_labels.txt'))\n",
    "shutil.copy2(str(labels_path), str(FLUTTER_ML_DIR / 'labels.txt'))\n",
    "\n",
    "print('File berhasil disalin ke:', FLUTTER_ML_DIR)\n"
   ]
  },
